properties.Name: Freewheel
properties.Description: A nonprofit community bike shop offering free tools, hands-on repair classes, and donated bikes to support accessible transportation in Madison.
properties.Hours: Check website for current open shop hours
properties.Services: Bike Repair, Bike Donation, Tool Lending, DIY Mechanics, Transportation Access, Walk-In, For Kids

properties.Name: St. Vincent de Paul Food Pantry
properties.Description: A drive-up food pantry providing fresh produce, meat, dairy, dry goods, personal care items, and emergency financial assistance to those in need.
properties.Hours: Mon-Tue & Fri: 10:30 AM-2:30 PM; Thu: 2:30-6:00 PM; Wed, Sat, Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Food Pantry, Fresh Produce, Meat & Dairy, Dry Goods, Personal Care Items, Pet Food, Emergency Food, Hunger Relief, Rent Assistance, Utility Assistance, Bus Fare, Walk-In

properties.Name: Second Harvest Foodbank
properties.Description: A regional food bank hub that distributes food to partner pantries and organizations across southern Wisconsin to address hunger in the community.
properties.Hours: Mon-Thu: 8:00 AM-4:30 PM; Fri: 8:00 AM-4:00 PM; Sat-Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Food Pantry, Fresh Produce, Dry Goods, Hunger Relief, Emergency Food

properties.Name: Neighborhood House Community Center
properties.Description: A welcoming community center offering a food pantry, social services, youth programs, and other resources to support diverse families in the Madison area.
properties.Hours: Mon, Wed-Thu: 9:30 AM-9:00 PM; Tue: 9:30 AM-8:00 PM; Fri: 9:30 AM-6:00 PM; Sun: 10:00 AM-12:00 PM; Sat: Closed
properties.Services: Food Pantry, Fresh Produce, Meat & Dairy, Dry Goods, Hunger Relief, Community Programs, For Kids

properties.Name: Madison Public Library - Goodman South Madison
properties.Description: A south Madison library branch offering free WiFi, books, programs, seed lending, and community resources in an accessible neighborhood location.
properties.Hours: Mon-Fri: 10:00 AM-8:00 PM; Sat: 9:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Free WiFi, Computer Access, Study Space, Printing, Community Programs, Media Lending, Seed Library, Walk-In, For Kids

properties.Name: Madison Public Library - Central
properties.Description: The main Madison Public Library branch, offering WiFi, an extensive book collection, community programs, kids' play areas, and access to all branch services.
properties.Services: Free WiFi, Computer Access, Study Space, Printing, Community Programs, Media Lending, Walk-In, For Kids

properties.Name: Monona Public Library
properties.Description: A highly rated public library in Monona with free WiFi, study rooms, a fireplace lounge, and a scenic park view — open seven days a week.
properties.Hours: Mon-Wed: 9:00 AM-8:00 PM; Thu-Fri: 9:00 AM-6:00 PM; Sat: 9:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sun: 1:00-5:00 PM
properties.Services: Free WiFi, Computer Access, Study Space, Printing, Community Programs, Media Lending, Walk-In, For Kids

properties.Name: Madison Public Library - Pinney
properties.Description: A well-loved east Madison library branch offering free WiFi, a large collection, children's programming, and emergency bike repair tools outside.
properties.Hours: Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM-9:00 PM; Sat: 9:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Free WiFi, Computer Access, Study Space, Printing, Community Programs, Media Lending, Bike Repair, Walk-In, For Kids

properties.Name: The Bicycle Recycle
properties.Description: A beloved community bike shop selling affordable refurbished bikes with warranties, offering expert tune-ups and encouraging bike donations for a second life.
properties.Hours: Tue, Fri-Sat: 10:30 AM-5:00 PM; Wed-Thu: 10:30 AM-3:30 PM; Mon & Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Bike Repair, Bike Donation, Transportation Access

properties.Name: Bikes for Kids Wisconsin
properties.Description: A nonprofit that provides free and low-cost refurbished bikes to children and adults in financial need, while also offering quality used bikes and repairs to the public.
properties.Hours: Mon-Thu: 10:00 AM-5:00 PM; Fri: 10:00 AM-4:00 PM; Sat-Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Bike Repair, Bike Donation, Transportation Access, For Kids

properties.Name: Quann Community Garden
properties.Description: A community garden in south Madison offering affordable plot rentals for residents to grow their own food in a welcoming outdoor space.
properties.Services: Plot Rental, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: Brittingham Community Garden
properties.Description: A membership-based community garden near Brittingham Park where residents can rent plots to grow produce in a beautiful shared green space.
properties.Services: Plot Rental, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: Reynolds Community Garden
properties.Description: A city-run community garden on the east side of Madison where residents can lease plots to grow their own fruits, vegetables, and herbs.
properties.Hours: Check with City of Madison Parks
properties.Services: Plot Rental, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: Lansing Food Forest
properties.Description: A growing urban food forest in northeast Madison designed to provide a community-tended edible landscape with fruit trees and sustainable plantings.
properties.Services: Food Forest, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Volunteer Gardening, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: St. Paul Community Gardens
properties.Description: A community garden on Madison's north side offering plot rentals to local residents for growing vegetables and building neighborhood connections.
properties.Hours: Check with City of Madison Parks
properties.Services: Plot Rental, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: McCormick Community Garden
properties.Description: A north Madison community garden space where neighbors can grow fresh produce and connect with other local gardeners.
properties.Hours: Check with City of Madison Parks
properties.Services: Plot Rental, Fresh Produce, Urban Farming, Outdoor Space

properties.Name: The Beacon
properties.Description: A day resource center for people experiencing homelessness in Madison, providing showers, case management, Medicaid navigation, and pathways to permanent housing.
properties.Services: Day Shelter, Showers, Case Management, Housing Navigation, Medicaid Enrollment, Walk-In

properties.Name: The Porchlight
properties.Description: A nonprofit providing emergency shelter, transitional housing, and supportive services to help adults experiencing homelessness in the Madison area.
properties.Services: Emergency Shelter, Transitional Housing, Case Management, Housing Navigation

properties.Name: YWCA Madison
properties.Description: A downtown Madison organization providing affordable housing for women and supportive services focused on eliminating racism and empowering women.
properties.Services: Transitional Housing, Emergency Shelter, Case Management

properties.Name: Road Home Dane County
properties.Description: A nonprofit offering case management, housing navigation, and supportive services to help individuals and families in Dane County move out of homelessness.
properties.Services: Emergency Shelter, Transitional Housing, Case Management, Housing Navigation, For Kids

properties.Name: Safe Haven
properties.Description: A Porchlight-operated shelter providing housing support and case management services for adults experiencing homelessness in the Madison area.
properties.Services: Emergency Shelter, Case Management, Housing Navigation

properties.Name: Men's Emergency Drop-In Shelter
properties.Description: A Porchlight-operated overnight emergency shelter for adult men, providing beds, meals, and showers on a nightly drop-in basis.
properties.Services: Emergency Shelter, Overnight Stay, Showers, Walk-In

properties.Name: End Domestic Abuse Wisconsin
properties.Description: A statewide advocacy organization working to prevent domestic abuse through policy, training, and support for survivors and local programs across Wisconsin.
properties.Services: Domestic Violence Support, Case Management, Housing Navigation

properties.Name: Tenney Preschool and Childcare
properties.Description: A parent cooperative preschool offering nature-based early childhood education and childcare for children ages 2-5 in a warm, community-oriented environment.
properties.Services: Preschool, After-School Care, Nature Education, For Kids

properties.Name: Ronald McDonald House
properties.Description: A home-away-from-home near UW Hospital providing free or low-cost lodging, meals, and support for families with children receiving medical treatment.
properties.Hours: Mon-Fri: 8:00 AM-9:00 PM; Sat-Sun: 9:00 AM-9:00 PM
properties.Services: Lodging Near Hospital, Meal Support, Family Housing, For Kids

properties.Name: The Bodgery
properties.Description: Madison's community makerspace offering members access to woodworking, metalworking, laser cutting, screen printing, and other tools in a collaborative, volunteer-run environment.
properties.Hours: Check website for member open hours
properties.Services: Woodworking, Laser Cutting, Metalworking, Screen Printing, Tool Access, Workshops

properties.Name: SSM Health Child Care Center
properties.Description: A licensed childcare center operated by SSM Health, providing weekday care for infants and young children near the hospital campus.
properties.Services: Preschool, Infant Care, For Kids

properties.Name: Sprouts Nature School
properties.Description: An outdoor nature-based preschool and after-school program in Madison that emphasizes hands-on exploration, play, and learning in natural environments.
properties.Services: Preschool, After-School Care, Nature Education, Summer Camp, For Kids

properties.Name: Badger Contractors Rental & Supply
properties.Description: A locally trusted equipment rental and supply shop offering a wide range of contractor and DIY tools with knowledgeable, hands-on customer service.
properties.Hours: Mon-Fri: 7:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sat: 8:00-10:00 AM; Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Equipment Rental, Contractor Supply, DIY Tools, Tool Access

properties.Name: Community Action Coalition for South Central Wisconsin
properties.Description: A social services agency providing emergency financial assistance, free clothing, housing support, and resources to low-income individuals and families in the region.
properties.Services: Emergency Financial Assistance, Rent Assistance, Utility Assistance, Clothing, Case Management, For Kids

properties.Name: Legal Action of Wisconsin
properties.Description: A nonprofit law firm providing free civil legal services to low-income individuals in Wisconsin, focusing on housing, benefits, and family law.
properties.Services: Legal Consultation, Civil Rights, Tenant Rights, Benefits Appeals, Family Law, Eviction Prevention

properties.Name: Dane County Law Library
properties.Description: A public law library located in the Dane County Courthouse offering access to legal research materials and self-help resources for residents.
properties.Services: Self-Help Legal, Law Library, Legal Consultation, Walk-In

properties.Name: Community Justice Inc
properties.Description: A Madison law firm focused on civil rights and community advocacy, providing legal representation with an emphasis on compassion and social justice.
properties.Services: Legal Consultation, Civil Rights, Tenant Rights, Family Law

properties.Name: Advocacy and Benefits Counseling for Health
properties.Description: A nonprofit (ABC for Health) that helps individuals and families navigate health insurance enrollment, Medicaid, and hospital financial assistance programs.
properties.Services: Medicaid Enrollment, Health Insurance Navigation, Hospital Bill Assistance, Benefits Appeals

properties.Name: Tenant Resource Center
properties.Description: A nonprofit offering free counseling, resources, and emergency rental assistance to both tenants and landlords navigating housing disputes and instability.
properties.Hours: Mon-Wed: 9:00 AM-6:00 PM; Thu: 9:00 AM-4:00 PM; Fri-Sun: Closed
properties.Services: Rental Assistance, Tenant Rights, Tenant Counseling, Landlord Mediation, Eviction Prevention

properties.Name: Voces De La Frontera
properties.Description: A grassroots immigrant and worker rights organization advocating for fair wages, immigration justice, and civic engagement for Latino communities in Wisconsin.
properties.Hours: Check website for current office hours
properties.Services: Immigration Advocacy, Civic Engagement, Wage Theft Support, Civil Rights, Spanish-Language

properties.Name: Worker Justice Wisconsin Walk-In Clinic
properties.Description: A walk-in clinic offering free legal consultations and advocacy for low-wage workers facing wage theft, unsafe conditions, or other workplace violations.
properties.Services: Wage Theft Support, Workplace Safety, Legal Consultation, Civil Rights, Walk-In, Spanish-Language
